title: PicoCTF Best Shell Challenge
snippet: In this tutorial, i am going to solve “best shell” challenge from PicoCTF 2014.We first download best_shell.c file using the following command:1$ curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ctfs/write-ups-2014/master/pico-ctf-2014/binary-exploitation/best-shell-160/best_shell.c -o best_shell.cA first ...
